div.div:
LAIA
agente padre — único, no duplicable
.laia-core/ + run_agent.py + 71 tools + gateway multi-plataforma

div.div:
.laia-core/ — motor del agente
laia-ui-server — UI admin :8077
arch-app — dashboard React
infra/ — systemd, LXD, laiactl
plugins/ — plugins del host
skills/ — marketplace (30+ cat)
workspace_store/ — SQLite+FTS5
workspaces/ — 7 workspaces
PATH REGISTRY (Atlas) — 32 aliases

div.div:
agora-backend/ — FastAPI :8088
┣ auth (JWT + pbkdf2)
┣ coordinator (monitor loop 30s)
┣ orchestrator (LXD control)
┣ storage (agora.db: users, agents, tasks)
┣ websocket (push alerts)
┣ fleet monitor (health daemon)
┗ 30+ endpoints — 69 tests
agora-app/ — React SPA
┣ MiAgente — perfil personal
┣ Agents — fleet admin
┣ Marketplace — skills
┗ Dashboard, Tasks, Chat...

• Ninguno se llama "LAIA"

• NO ven contexto ARCH
• Usuario edita: nombre, skills, comportamiento, plugins propios
